summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Music Hub application. All backend APIs and frontend features working perfectly. French language UI, Deezer API integration, Billboard scraping, and Blind Test game all functional.
passed_tests: All 28 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Home page loads with search bar, Billboard card, and Blind Test card
Artist search autocomplete with 'Daft Punk' - dropdown appears correctly
Artist page navigation and data display (name, image, fans, albums, tracks)
Billboard page loads with current week chart (100 songs)
Billboard year selector switches between current week and year-end views
Blind Test player name entry and game start functionality
YouTube video embedding and answer choices display
Blind Test answer selection and next question navigation
Navigation between all pages using header links and logo
French language UI throughout the application
